summary: iter210 testing complete: EchoWaste Phase 1+2 scaffold, remediate_broken_lifecycle intent, and audit helpers (BE-3, BE-4, BE-5, FE-2, FE-3, FE-4, FE-5) all verified. Backend 100% pass (20/20), Frontend EchoWaste panel fully functional after adding missing panel metadata.

fixed_issues.issue: Panel not loading - missing metadata in panel-metadata.ts and panel-types.ts
fixed_issues.fix: Added echowaste entry to PANEL_METADATA, PanelKey type, and PANEL_PRIORITIES

seed_data_creation: Multiple waste entries created via capture/init + capture/video during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: EchoWaste panel now works after adding metadata. Vision is MOCKED via _run_vision_stub (deterministic 1-3 items from 5-commodity table). Electron files exist at /app/electron/main.js with yarn electron:dev script. Tailwind echo.* tokens configured in tailwind.config.ts.

backend.echowaste_entries_list: GET /api/waste/entries returns entries list with total
backend.echowaste_training_pending: GET /api/waste/training/pending requires admin token (401 without, 200 with)
backend.echo_chat_remediate_intent: POST /api/echo/chat 'fix Elroy Lipfrat' returns remediate_broken_lifecycle intent with plan
backend.echo_chat_remediate_no_match: POST /api/echo/chat 'fix NonExistent' returns couldn't find message
backend.lib_time_utcnow_iso: utcnow_iso() returns ISO string with timezone
backend.lib_mongo_strip_id: strip_id() and strip_ids() remove _id from documents

frontend.echowaste_panel_opens: EchoWaste panel opens from sidebar under Events & Catering
frontend.echowaste_tabs: 3 tabs visible: Capture Hub, Entries, Daily Digest
frontend.echowaste_capture_video: Video capture button triggers capture, shows last entry card
frontend.echowaste_review_drawer: Review drawer opens with item details (name, count, portion_g, cost)
frontend.echowaste_entries_list: Entries tab shows 9 captured entries with VIDEO/VOICE/STILL modes
frontend.echowaste_digest: Daily Digest tab renders (0 day rows since entries are from today)
frontend.tailwind_echo_tokens: text-echo-primary renders with color (not black, not empty)

file_system.electron_scripts: package.json has electron:dev and electron:start scripts

mocked_apis.echowaste_vision: _run_vision_stub deterministic detector (1-3 items from 5-commodity table hashed on capture_id)
